design_philosophy: A sophisticated, trust-inspiring, and grounded aesthetic that establishes CASNAGGI as a highly credible international NGO. The design balances raw, documentary-style human stories with bold, authoritative typography to convey both compassion and governance. Generous whitespace, asymmetric bento grids, and earth-toned palettes distinguish it from generic templates.

typography.h1: font-outfit text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] tracking-tight leading-[1.05] font-semibold
typography.h2: font-outfit text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-[1.1] font-medium
typography.h3: font-outfit text-2xl md:text-3xl tracking-tight leading-[1.2] font-medium
typography.h4: font-outfit text-xl md:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-[1.3] font-medium
typography.overline: font-sans text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#E05A47]

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 md:px-8 lg:px-12
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8 lg:gap-12

surfaces_and_components.card_tactile: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E1D8] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8 md:p-10 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_12px_48px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1
surfaces_and_components.header_glass: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FCFBF8]/80 border-b border-[#E5E1D8]/50 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#E05A47] text-white font-medium rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#C84836] hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#E05A47] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#FCFBF8]
surfaces_and_components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#1A4A38] text-white font-medium rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#113125] hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5
surfaces_and_components.button_outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-transparent border border-[#E5E1D8] text-[#1B241E] font-medium rounded-full transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#F2F0E6] hover:border-[#D6C7B3]
surfaces_and_components.image_overlay_dark: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-black/20 to-transparent

hero.description: Group of African women in vibrant clothing outdoors (Hope, Community)

programs.description: Hand planting a sapling, representing growth and public service

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion variants (initial={opacity: 0, y: 20}, animate={opacity: 1, y: 0}) for text blocks.
motion_and_interactions.stagger_children: Use transition={{ staggerChildren: 0.1 }} on list containers.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Apply subtle y-axis translation on scroll for hero images and large graphic elements.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a subtle 'Editorial Ribbon' of core values across the homepage (bg-[#F2F0E6] text-[#1A4A38] uppercase tracking-widest).

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Full height (min-h-[80vh] or min-h-screen). Absolute background image (hero_home) with a subtle dark gradient overlay. Content bottom-left aligned.
sections.content: Headline: 'Compassion meets Governance.', Subhead: 'Care Support for the Needy and Good Governance Initiative (CASNAGGI). Empowering communities, advocating for justice, and building a sustainable future in Nigeria and beyond.', CTA: 'Our Impact' & 'Donate Now'

sections.name: Core Values Marquee
sections.content: Compassion • Integrity • Equality • Empowerment • Good Governance • Collaboration

sections.name: Mission Preview (Bento Grid)
sections.layout: Bento Grid (12 cols). A large text block spanning 8 cols expressing the mission. A tall image spanning 4 cols showing 'public_service' sapling image.
sections.content: We provide humanitarian care and advocate for good governance.

sections.name: Thematic Areas (Programs Preview)
sections.layout: Grid of 3 cards (md:grid-cols-3) using 'card_tactile'. Features: Humanitarian Care, Youth Empowerment, Women Empowerment. Use Phosphor Icons or Heroicons.

sections.name: Impact Stats
sections.layout: Solid block (bg-[#1A4A38] text-white). 3-4 massive numbers using the Display font.
sections.content: Large typography emphasizing lives touched or communities reached.

sections.name: Header
sections.layout: Minimalist solid background with large bold typography. No image.

sections.name: History & Vision
sections.layout: Two-column grid. Left: Sticky heading. Right: Flowing prose.
sections.content: Detailed history and our vision for Nigeria.

sections.name: Code of Ethics
sections.layout: List with generous spacing. Each item has a subtle border-b.

sections.name: Board of Trustees
sections.layout: Grid of profiles. Square images (grayscale or subtle tint), names, and bios.
sections.content: Founder Ifeoma Okorie, Lady Eucharia Nganya, Mr Favour Iwuchukwu.

sections.name: Program Showcase
sections.layout: Alternating Left/Right layouts. Large images (from media.programs) next to detailed descriptions.
sections.content: Sections for Humanitarian Care, Youth Empowerment, Women Empowerment, Governance, Peacebuilding, Public Service.

sections.name: Stats Overview
sections.layout: Bento grid with distinct solid background colors for each stat.

sections.name: Action Grid
sections.layout: 4 equal columns. High-contrast cards for Volunteer, Fundraise, Donate, Partner.
sections.content: Clear CTAs for each action. Use 'volunteer_action' image.

sections.name: Donate UI
sections.content: Static information on ways to give. Bank details, crypto, or contact info. No payment gateway needed. Large primary button to copy details.

sections.name: Contact Split
sections.layout: 2 columns. Left: Information (49 Customs Road, Bayelsa State). Right: Shadcn Form.

components_and_libraries.icons: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone icons.
components_and_libraries.animations: framer-motion for page transitions and scroll reveals.
components_and_libraries.ui_primitives: Shadcn UI (Form, Input, Textarea, Button, Card). Must be heavily customized to strip generic borders and use the 'tactile' or 'solid' styling defined in surfaces.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields) MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='donate-cta-button', data-testid='nav-about-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Ensure Outfit and Work Sans are imported via Google Fonts.
Install required packages: framer-motion, react-fast-marquee, @phosphor-icons/react (optional if using lucide).
Tailwind configuration: Extend tailwind.config.js with the custom colors defined above. Add font families.
Build the layout shell: Implement the sticky glass header and a dark, massive footer with big typography (e.g., 'Let's Talk' text-[10vw]).
Routing: Set up React Router for the 7 pages.
Media rules: Use the exact URLs provided in the media object. NEVER use placeholder images. If an image isn't available, rely on bold typography and solid color blocks.
Follow 'E1' Anti-AI rules: Do NOT center-align everything. Use left-alignment for long text. Leave generous breathing room (p-12 to p-24). Avoid default Shadcn styles; make the UI feel bespoke.
